---
title: Talian corpus
---

<style>
.image {
  border-radius: 50%;
  min-width: 50%;
  opacity: 1;
  display: block;
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  transition: .5s ease;
  backface-visibility: hidden;
}

.curve { 
	width: 35%;
	max-width: 100%;
	height: auto;
	float: right;
	margin: 1.5rem;
	margin-right:1rem;
	shape-outside:circle(50%);
	-webkit-clip-path: circle(50%);
}

</style>



<div align = "justify">


Project by <a href = "https://nataliaguzzo.github.io" target = "_blank">**Natália B. Guzzo**</a> and <a href="https://guilhermegarcia.github.io" target = "_blank">**Guilherme D. Garcia**</a>

Below you can download our corpus.


---

### Corpus


- Download `RData` version
- Download `csv` version

</div>


---
